key_signal: Trump is operating in a manic, victory-focused state while simultaneously escalating military tensions in Iran. His chaotic Truth Social posting combined with aggressive policy announcements suggests he's energized by perceived diplomatic wins but increasingly volatile in execution.

primary_target: Iran nuclear negotiations and geopolitical rivals (Xi, Spain)
key_signal: Trump is in consolidation mode—celebrating economic wins (tax policy, refinery projects) while simultaneously rattling the saber on Iran and positioning himself as a dealmaker with China. The lower post frequency and reduced caps suggest calculated messaging rather than reactive fury.

Trump is escalating military threats against Iran while simultaneously claiming negotiating superiority through economic blockade pressure. He's signaling willingness to conduct large-scale strikes if Iran doesn't capitulate to his 'deal' terms.

Trump is operating from a position of perceived strength and victory, with controlled messaging focused on economic wins and military posturing rather than domestic chaos. His unusually low posting activity (2 vs. 18/day baseline) suggests either deliberate message discipline or scheduled activities.

Trump is in aggressive war-posture mode with Iran ceasefire ending Wednesday, while simultaneously defending his record domestically and attacking media credibility. He's energized by military action and dismissive of critics.

primary_target: Iran's financial/military collapse and ceasefire leverage
key_signal: Trump is projecting confidence in economic coercion against Iran while employing detailed tactical messaging about blockade strategy. His focus on Iran's financial distress and internal military dissent suggests he believes time/economic pressure favors his negotiating position, not theirs.

Trump is simultaneously escalating Iran tensions (hints at strikes, maintains blockade) while claiming diplomatic fairness, then extending ceasefire—suggesting either tactical flexibility or reactive course-correction under pressure from world leaders.
